message:
feat(viewer): show error page for invalid URLs, reduce min viewport size

- Add renderErrorPage() to show friendly error when page fails to load
  instead of crashing with ScreencastTimeout
- User can press Ctrl+L to try another URL or Ctrl+Q to quit
- Reduce MIN_WIDTH/MIN_HEIGHT from 800x600 to 100x100 to fix
  viewport scaling on narrow terminals (was wasting ~23% height)
- Add handleBinaryFilePreview/handleBinaryFolderPreview to mux server
- Optimize mux render loop with direct IOSurface encoding
